name: Thunderbird Resources Limited
description: Thunderbird Resources Limited, now known as Xpedra Resources Limited, is an Australian-based exploration company focused on the discovery and development of critical and precious mineral projects. The company maintains a diverse portfolio of assets, including gold and antimony projects in the New England Orogen of New South Wales, Australia, as well as advanced uranium and copper projects located in the Athabasca Basin of Canada and Peru, respectively. The company is committed to systematic exploration and development of these high-potential mineral opportunities to drive long-term value.
